title: [phase:critique] [family:reviewer-lane] [provider_hint:codex-sidecar] Review the auth-hardening remaining-task changes only. Files: /Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/handlers/cockpit-api.ts, /Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/jwt-auth.ts, /Users/masayuki/...
summary_text: Findings (prioritized): 1. **High – malformed/whitespace JSON is now treated as success instead of failure** - [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js):9 and [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js):101 - `parseResponseText` swallows JSON parse errors and returns raw text, and `fetchJson` returns `payload || {}`. This means `200` responses with invalid JSON (including whitespace-only bodies) no longer throw; they are treated as successful payloads. That is a behavior regression from fail-fast parsing and can let protocol/server errors pass silently into callers. - Missing test coverage for this path in [test-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-endpoint-client.js):21 (only refresh-success and 503 are covered). 2. **Medium – refresh requests always include current `Authorization` header** - [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js):42 and [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js):63 - `runRequest` always merges `buildHeaders(config?.authToken)`, so the refresh call sends the (potentially expired) bearer token along with refresh token payload. This can break API compatibility with refresh endpoints that are expected to be unauthenticated or are protected by strict auth middleware. - Missing assertion for refresh-call header shape in [test-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-endpoint-client.js):33. 3. **Low – new endpoint-client test is not included in documented verification loop** - [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/README.md):96 and [test-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-endpoint-client.js):1 - The new test exists, but the verification commands documented for this app do not include it, so this auth-hardening path can be skipped during routine checks.
